$schema: Local convention: maps cron job names (the path's basename in vercel.json) to per-job alert thresholds in minutes. warn_minutes / critical_minutes override the default 2× / 4× expected-interval calculation. Omit a job to use defaults.

alert_webhook.$comment: Optional webhook hit by checkCronHealth when alerts fire. URL comes from env (CRON_ALERT_WEBHOOK_URL) so secrets don't end up in the repo. adapter: 'generic' (default), 'slack', or 'pagerduty'. min_severity: 'critical' or 'warn'. pagerduty_dedup: 'global' or 'per-job'. dry_run: true → log the payload that WOULD have been POSTed instead of actually firing it. Useful for staging.

consecutive_failures.$comment: How many recent runs to inspect for consecutive failures (window) and how many in a row trigger an alert (threshold).

replay.$comment: Suppress repeat replays for this many minutes after a successful one. Operator can override with { force: true } in the POST body.
